ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle platform (e.g., Fiesta, F-150) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the platform */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the platform */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle platform */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle platform */,
  "engine_types" TEXT /* List of engine types supported by the platform */,
  "transmission_types" TEXT /* List of transmission types supported by the platform */,
  "body_styles" TEXT /* List of body styles supported by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vent_assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vent assembly */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle platform */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, VID) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the vent assembly documentation */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the vent assembly */,
  "model_year_start" INTEGER /* Start model year for the vent assembly */,
  "model_year_end" INTEGER /* End model year for the vent assembly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vent assembly */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the vent assembly */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes on compatibility with specific vehicle configurations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vent_assemblies_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES vehicle_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boost_gauges" (
  "gauge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boost gauge */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle platform */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, VID) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the boost gauge documentation */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the boost gauge */,
  "model_year_start" INTEGER /* Start model year for the boost gauge */,
  "model_year_end" INTEGER /* End model year for the boost gauge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the boost gauge */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the boost gauge */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes on compatibility with specific vehicle configurations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gauge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boost_gauges_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES vehicle_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multi_gauges" (
  "gauge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multi-gauge */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle platform */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, VID) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the multi-gauge documentation */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the multi-gauge */,
  "model_year_start" INTEGER /* Start model year for the multi-gauge */,
  "model_year_end" INTEGER /* End model year for the multi-gauge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the multi-gauge */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the multi-gauge */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes on compatibility with specific vehicle configurations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gauge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multi_gauges_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES vehicle_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_x_settings" (
  "settings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CAR.X settings */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle platform */,
  "settings_type" TEXT /* Type of settings (e.g., FORD) */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the CAR.X settings */,
  "model_year_start" INTEGER /* Start model year for the CAR.X settings */,
  "model_year_end" INTEGER /* End model year for the CAR.X settings */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the CAR.X settings */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the CAR.X settings */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes on compatibility with specific vehicle configurations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_x_settings_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES vehicle_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility detail */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle platform */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes and compatibility details for the platform */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the compatibility detail */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., vent_assembly, boost_gauge) */,
  "model_year_start" INTEGER /* Start model year for the compatibility detail */,
  "model_year_end" INTEGER /* End model year for the compatibility detail */,
  "software_requirements" TEXT /* Specific software requirements for the compatibility detail */,
  "installation_guides" TEXT /* File paths to installation guides */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_details_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES vehicle_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales_rep, tech_support, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform or product */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform or product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product accessed */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES vehicle_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle platform */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product ordered (e.g., vent_assembly, boost_gauge) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address for shipping the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES vehicle_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting support */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle platform */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution provided */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the support ticket (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related order (if applicable) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the support ticket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the support ticket was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the support ticket was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES vehicle_platforms ("platform_id")
)
